name: Marco Rubio
subject: What I want to do about energy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

When we're trying to make sure the American economy can
compete in the 21st century, there's a crucial natural advantage
we have over a lot of our competitors: our abundant energy
resources.

Today in Oklahoma City, I'm speaking about energy's
importance and how we can best use the resources we're blessed to
have. Click here to read some of my thoughts on MarcoRubio.com.

There are three things we can do right now that will have
immediate, positive impacts:

Lift the ban on crude oil exports: With American oil
production higher than it's been in decades, ending this outdated
ban will be a big boost to economic growth and job creation.

Block President Obama's national energy tax:
President Obama's new regulations from the EPA will inflate
electricity costs for consumers while doing almost nothing to
help the environment. Hillary Clinton has already said defending
it is a "top priority"; as President, I'd block it.

Let the states handle energy production: Rather than
letting the federal government hamstring energy production with
confusing mandates, I'd let states control as much as possible,
because they know the situation best.

These and other policy changes can help us make the best
use of our energy wealth right now and in the decades to come.

Energy has already played a role in keeping the American
economy stronger than it would be otherwise. If we get this and
other issues right, I have no doubt we can make the 21st century
a New American Century.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Mary Pat Christie
subject: Chris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
This Sunday is Chris' 53rd birthday.

Chris doesn't like to make a big deal about his birthday, but I know he would like to hear from all of his closest supporters across America. He's been so busy on the campaign trail, we're just excited to have him here for a family birthday celebration at home!
**[Add your name and a note to his card and I'll personally make sure he gets it](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43721192:19054181150:m:1:1516426255:EC9BEB8883A1B46E9567AEE304CB3CB3:r)**.

Thanks for your support,

Mary Pat

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A national disgrace
body:
#
**[Sign my petition if you agree that every Democratic candidate running for president should publicly support a $15 minimum wage.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5f8/3745785252/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/15minwage?source=em150902mw-full")**
**Friend: Nobody who works 40 hours a week should live in poverty.**
The current federal minimum wage is a starvation wage, and it must become a living wage. That is why I recently introduced legislation that would increase the minimum wage to $15 an hour over the next several years.
When we first talked about this idea, hundreds of people wrote in to share how a raise to $15 an hour would change their lives. I heard from parents caring for young children, from children caring for their aging parents, from students, and from countless others. I want you to read two of those notes:
> _"Raising the minimum wage would mean that my single mother would no longer have to break her back working two jobs just to barely afford to support me and our family."_
And:
> _"If I made 15 dollars an hour at one job, I would not have to work 65 hours a week at three different jobs to afford rent, bills, food and other living expenses. If I made 15 dollars an hour I could easily support myself while having money left over to put in savings, invest back into the economy, and have a rainy day fund in case my car breaks down or something unexpected comes up without having to rely on a credit card or small personal loans. I think psychologically I would be a lot happier."_
The good news is, we are making progress on this issue. We started with Democrats advocating for an increase from $7.25 to $10.10 an hour in 2014. Earlier this year, a handful of senators introduced a bill that would raise the minimum wage to $12 an hour. **And just last week, the call to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour was approved as part of the official Democratic Party platform.**
I believe that position should be adopted by all of the candidates running for president. Sadly, that is not yet true, even for the Democrats.
[**Sign my petition if you agree that every Democratic candidate running for president should publicly support a $15 minimum wage.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5f8/3745785252/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/15minwage?source=em150902mw-full")
It is a national disgrace that millions of full-time workers are living in poverty and millions more are forced to work two or three jobs just to pay their bills. We live in the richest country in the world, but that reality means very little because so much of that wealth is controlled by a tiny handful of individuals.
**But real change is possible when large numbers of ordinary Americans speak out, vote, and get involved in the democratic process.** If we stand together, we will win. If we are divided, the big money interests opposed to raising the minimum wage will win.
Nothing significant happens in this country without a strong grassroots movement. That's what this political revolution is all about.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5f9/3745785252/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150902minwage-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5e6/3745785252/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5e7/3745785252/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5e4/3745785252/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2233/43f17890/5ad03be1/621cf5e5/3745785252/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Scott Walker
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter, thank you for signing up to be a part of our campaign. As one of our top supporters in Virginia, I need to ask for your urgent help. In order for my name to appear on the Republican Presidential Primary ballot in Virginia, we must collect thousands of signatures from residents all across the state.
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, thank you for signing up to be a part of our campaign. As one of our top supporters in Virginia, I need to ask for your urgent help. In order for my name to appear on the Republican Presidential Primary ballot in Virginia, we must collect thousands of signatures from residents all across the state. Peter, here is how you can help:
1. Please [click here to download](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) and print the petition to gather signatures.
2. Next, talk to your family, friends, and neighbors and encourage them to sign the form.

We don’t have much time. This is a critically important part of our campaign and we will only be successful with your support. [Download the form today](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) and help ensure we are on the ballot in Virginia. Thanks again for your support, Scott Walker
[View As Webpage](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/servlet/MailView?ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) | Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.
[www.ScottWalker.com](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

For more ways to get involved follow us on [Facebook](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM0MTQwNzUS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMjAwOTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Scott Walker Inc. P.O. Box 620590, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Thanks to supporters like you we were able to hit our August goal and have a strong finish for the summer.

I wanted to make sure you saw our recent campaign update. We've had a busy and exciting summer, including some key endorsements and numerous events across Maryland, so be sure to check it out below.

Thank you once again - it's only because of your support that we've built such a strong and thriving movement.

Chris

_\----Original Message----_ Dear Friend, As we head into the waning days of summer, our campaign continues to charge ahead, full steam and gaining momentum with each passing day. It's a reflection of the priorities that Chris Van Hollen has always had -- and not just during his U.S. Senate candidacy, but over his entire career as an effective leader who gets things done for Maryland families. Labor Day is almost upon us, and for all the volunteers, interns and staff working tirelessly at Van Hollen HQ, there's nothing more exciting than seeing the swell of incredible grassroots energy as Chris meets with voters in communities all across Maryland. We know this race is just starting to heat up, but there's no denying the potency of Chris' message of progressive leadership, effectiveness and getting things done for hardworking families in this state. After all, that's Chris Van Hollen's record. **COMMUNITY OUTREACH AND EVENTS:** With Congress in August recess, it has been an incredibly busy month for this campaign -- and nobody is working harder than Chris. We've held nearly a dozen meet-and-greet events with huge turnouts in every corner of the state. These are a chance for anyone to come out and hear from Chris about his vision for Maryland, or just to share their thoughts on issues with our next U.S. Senator. Katherine Van Hollen has been doing similar meetings with women activists who are eager to get involved with our campaign. **ENDORSEMENTS:** Chris continues to rack up support from key community advocates, local elected officials and statewide progressive leaders who know his record of getting things done for Marylanders and have thrown their support behind his candidacy. We're talking about individuals who have already earned the trust of voters in their towns, neighborhoods and cities across Maryland. And that's exactly why it matters when Delegate Maggie McIntosh stands alongside Chris at a Baltimore diner and he receives support from respected Baltimore leaders; or when former Delegate and progressive champion Heather Mizeur urges her supporters to mobilize for Chris; or when a powerhouse State Senator like Joanne Benson urges her Prince Georges' County constituents to support Chris because of his record of delivering for students seniors, women and working families. Outside observers may sometimes miss this significance of endorsements like these, as well as so many others that Chris has already secured. But plugged-in Democrats like you understand why having trusted community allies gives Chris an important edge. Other key endorsements recently include Sen. Jim Mathias of Ocean City, an influential and beloved Democrat on the Eastern Shore, and Del. Erek Barron of Prince George's County, who just last week became the latest of a telling number of elected officials from Maryland's 4th congressional district to get behind Chris in this election. **ENDORSEMENTS HEADLINES:** **[Mizeur backs Van Hollen for Senate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958fb0/349294240/VEsH/ "http://www.baltimoresun.com/news/maryland/politics/blog/bal-mizeur-backs-van-hollen-for-senate-20150826-story.html")** By John Fritze, The Baltimore Sun, August 26, 2015 "Heather R. Mizeur, a former state lawmaker who developed an energetic following among Maryland progressives during her run for governor last year, is endorsing Rep. Chris Van Hollen for Senate, according to a video **[posted on her Facebook page](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958fb1/349294240/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/posts/10153121647836732")** Wednesday." [**Van Hollen picks up Baltimore endorsements**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4e/349294240/VEsF/ "http://www.baltimoresun.com/news/maryland/politics/blog/bal-van-hollen-picks-up-baltimore-endorsements-20150821-story.html") By John Fritze, The Baltimore Sun, August 21, 2015 "City Councilwoman Rochelle "Rikki" Spector, former Maryland Attorney General Stephen H. Sachs and longtime Democratic power broker Rick O. Berndt are supporting Van Hollen's effort to replace retiring Sen. Barbara A. Mikulski" [**Influential Baltimore politician backs Chris Van Hollen for Senate**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4f/349294240/VEsC/ "http://www.washingtonpost.com/news/post-politics/wp/2015/07/30/influential-baltimore-politician-backs-chris-van-hollen-for-senate/") By Rachel Weiner, The Washington Post, July 30, 2015 "Rep. Chris Van Hollen scored a major endorsement Thursday in the Maryland Democratic Senate primary, winning the backing of state Del. Maggie McIntosh (D)." **ALSO IN THE NEWS:** You may have heard this week that Sen. Ted Cruz is once again threatening to shut down the federal government -- this time over funding for Planned Parenthood. Well it should come as no surprise that Chris is fighting back, just like he did when Cruz and his Tea Party allies tried to bring us to a standstill in 2013 to protest funding for the Affordable Care Act. Check out Chris' interview on MSNBC Wednesday night where he discussed the looming shutdown crisis and the need for effective leadership to confront the Tea Party's irresponsible attack on the rights and health care of women across this country. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4c/349294240/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/videos/10153123499571732/") [**WATCH CHRIS ON MSNBC **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4c/349294240/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/videos/10153123499571732/") **LEGISLATIVE UPDATE:** While Chris is working hard to connect with voters across Maryland, he remains focused on the issues at hand as a national leader for commonsense progressive solutions to address our biggest challenges. Here's just a few of the bills he's working on:
* As he's done throughout his career, Chris is taking on the NRA to advance meaningful gun safety legislation -- just like he did in the Maryland Senate when he passed Maryland's historic law to require built-in trigger locks on handgun sales. Chris fought the powerful gun lobby -- and even members of his own party -- to get that law passed, and now once again he's taking up that fight. Chris' new legislation would create incentivizes for other states to replicate what Maryland did nearly two years ago: pass a law that requires anyone purchasing a handgun to first obtain a license, the same way we require licenses to drive a car or fish in a river. The Washington Post recently called Chris' bill, "**[a sensible, state-based answer to gun violence.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4d/349294240/VEsB/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/a-sensible-state-based-answer-to-gun-violence/2015/07/28/f779dc0c-113a-11e5-9726-49d6fa26a8c6_story.html")** "

* Our nation's infrastructure is outdated and desperately in need of maintenance and repair, and to make matters worse the Highway Trust Fund is drying up. Chris is sponsoring a bill that would close an international tax loophole that allows corporations to dodge their responsibilities to American taxpayers, and instead use that revenue -- $40 billion -- to invest in modernizing our nation's vital infrastructure.

As the former chair of the Maryland Democratic Party, and now as co-chair of Chris's campaign, I couldn't be more excited by the genuine grassroots people-powered momentum we're seeing on the ground, and that's all thanks to incredible supporters like you. It's your energy, generosity and hard work that makes the difference every single day, and I hope you know just how grateful Chris is for everything that you do. Yvette Lewis Co-Chair, Van Hollen for U.S. Senate P.S. Don't miss out on future updates from Chris and the rest of the team. Be sure to follow us on Facebook and Twitter. | [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4a/349294240/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD") | [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e4b/349294240/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/vanhollenformd")
---|---

[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f17/70cdc2ba/47a1ac32/3958e48/349294240/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em090215&amount=25.00")

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

clean_body: Friend, Thanks to supporters like you we were able to hit our August goal and have a strong finish for the summer. I wanted to make sure you saw our recent campaign update. We've had a busy and exciting summer, including some key endorsements and numerous events across Maryland, so be sure to check it out below. Thank you once again - it's only because of your support that we've built such a strong and thriving movement. Chris \----Original Message---- Dear Friend, As we head into the waning days of summer, our campaign continues to charge ahead, full steam and gaining momentum with each passing day. It's a reflection of the priorities that Chris Van Hollen has always had -- and not just during his U.S. Senate candidacy, but over his entire career as an effective leader who gets things done for Maryland families. Labor Day is almost upon us, and for all the volunteers, interns and staff working tirelessly at Van Hollen HQ, there's nothing more exciting than seeing the swell of incredible grassroots energy as Chris meets with voters in communities all across Maryland. We know this race is just starting to heat up, but there's no denying the potency of Chris' message of progressive leadership, effectiveness and getting things done for hardworking families in this state. After all, that's Chris Van Hollen's record. COMMUNITY OUTREACH AND EVENTS: With Congress in August recess, it has been an incredibly busy month for this campaign -- and nobody is working harder than Chris. We've held nearly a dozen meet-and-greet events with huge turnouts in every corner of the state. These are a chance for anyone to come out and hear from Chris about his vision for Maryland, or just to share their thoughts on issues with our next U.S. Senator. Katherine Van Hollen has been doing similar meetings with women activists who are eager to get involved with our campaign. ENDORSEMENTS: Chris continues to rack up support from key community advocates, local elected officials and statewide progressive leaders who know his record of getting things done for Marylanders and have thrown their support behind his candidacy. We're talking about individuals who have already earned the trust of voters in their towns, neighborhoods and cities across Maryland. And that's exactly why it matters when Delegate Maggie McIntosh stands alongside Chris at a Baltimore diner and he receives support from respected Baltimore leaders; or when former Delegate and progressive champion Heather Mizeur urges her supporters to mobilize for Chris; or when a powerhouse State Senator like Joanne Benson urges her Prince Georges' County constituents to support Chris because of his record of delivering for students seniors, women and working families. Outside observers may sometimes miss this significance of endorsements like these, as well as so many others that Chris has already secured. But plugged-in Democrats like you understand why having trusted community allies gives Chris an important edge. Other key endorsements recently include Sen. Jim Mathias of Ocean City, an influential and beloved Democrat on the Eastern Shore, and Del. Erek Barron of Prince George's County, who just last week became the latest of a telling number of elected officials from Maryland's 4th congressional district to get behind Chris in this election. ENDORSEMENTS HEADLINES: "" By John Fritze, The Baltimore Sun, August 26, 2015 "Heather R. Mizeur, a former state lawmaker who developed an energetic following among Maryland progressives during her run for governor last year, is endorsing Rep. Chris Van Hollen for Senate, according to a video "" Wednesday." "" By John Fritze, The Baltimore Sun, August 21, 2015 "City Councilwoman Rochelle "Rikki" Spector, former Maryland Attorney General Stephen H. Sachs and longtime Democratic power broker Rick O. Berndt are supporting Van Hollen's effort to replace retiring Sen. Barbara A. Mikulski" "" By Rachel Weiner, The Washington Post, July 30, 2015 "Rep. Chris Van Hollen scored a major endorsement Thursday in the Maryland Democratic Senate primary, winning the backing of state Del. Maggie McIntosh (D)." ALSO IN THE NEWS: You may have heard this week that Sen. Ted Cruz is once again threatening to shut down the federal government -- this time over funding for Planned Parenthood. Well it should come as no surprise that Chris is fighting back, just like he did when Cruz and his Tea Party allies tried to bring us to a standstill in 2013 to protest funding for the Affordable Care Act. Check out Chris' interview on MSNBC Wednesday night where he discussed the looming shutdown crisis and the need for effective leadership to confront the Tea Party's irresponsible attack on the rights and health care of women across this country. "" "" LEGISLATIVE UPDATE: While Chris is working hard to connect with voters across Maryland, he remains focused on the issues at hand as a national leader for commonsense progressive solutions to address our biggest challenges. Here's just a few of the bills he's working on: As he's done throughout his career, Chris is taking on the NRA to advance meaningful gun safety legislation -- just like he did in the Maryland Senate when he passed Maryland's historic law to require built-in trigger locks on handgun sales. Chris fought the powerful gun lobby -- and even members of his own party -- to get that law passed, and now once again he's taking up that fight. Chris' new legislation would create incentivizes for other states to replicate what Maryland did nearly two years ago: pass a law that requires anyone purchasing a handgun to first obtain a license, the same way we require licenses to drive a car or fish in a river. The Washington Post recently called Chris' bill, " "" " Our nation's infrastructure is outdated and desperately in need of maintenance and repair, and to make matters worse the Highway Trust Fund is drying up. Chris is sponsoring a bill that would close an international tax loophole that allows corporations to dodge their responsibilities to American taxpayers, and instead use that revenue -- $40 billion -- to invest in modernizing our nation's vital infrastructure. As the former chair of the Maryland Democratic Party, and now as co-chair of Chris's campaign, I couldn't be more excited by the genuine grassroots people-powered momentum we're seeing on the ground, and that's all thanks to incredible supporters like you. It's your energy, generosity and hard work that makes the difference every single day, and I hope you know just how grateful Chris is for everything that you do. Yvette Lewis Co-Chair, Van Hollen for U.S. Senate P.S. Don't miss out on future updates from Chris and the rest of the team. Be sure to follow us on Facebook and Twitter. | "" | "" ---|--- "" Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. name: Katie McGinty
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

I will never get tired of saying this: I'm so grateful for all of the support I've seen on this campaign. Pennsylvanians and supporters all around the country stepped up in a big way -- and we completely blew our first fundraising goal out of the water!

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2272490522280984576/8268347232084819968)
---

In just a few weeks, over 630 people have stepped up to make a financial investment in this campaign. Thank you for helping us hit our August goal and showing the grassroots strength powering this campaign for U.S. Senate. To anyone who may have doubted we have what it takes to beat Pat Toomey, our response is clear: **It 's on**.

I've been on the road in Pennsylvania listening to what matters most to you. We need to protect Medicare and Social Security, make investments in jobs here at home, and act on innovative clean energy solutions to preserve our planet for our kids and grandkids. And to do all of that, we need a new Senator.

**I 'm ready to be your voice in Washington, but this campaign will take all of us working together. [Stay up-to-date on what's happening with our campaign by following our Facebook page today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2272490522280984576/8268347232084819968)**

Thank you for your support,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2272490522280984576/8340404826122747904?refcode=20150902e&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2272490522280984576/8196289638046892032).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: The Iran Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

When it comes to taking a position on any bill, Floridians know my promise: I will listen to them, I will listen to my conscience, and I will deeply study what's on my desk before making a decision.

The past few weeks, the proposal on my desk has been the nuclear deal with Iran. I have to say, this has been the toughest decision of my career in Congress. After listening to arguments on both sides, carefully reviewing all the materials, and soliciting answers from both supporters and opponents, I have reached a decision.

A nuclear Iran would be an unacceptable threat to America and Israel. As a nation, we must always keep all options on the table. But before we place our Armed Forces in harm's way, I feel I owe it to all Floridians -- especially our servicemembers -- to exhaust all other courses of action.

The deal we have is flawed. But it is also the best available option to stop the development of a nuclear weapon in Iran.

Make no mistake -- Iran will remain a foe of America and Israel. The United States and our coalition partners will maintain pressure on Iran to halt their nefarious activities, including arms dealing, violations of human rights, and sponsorship of terrorism.

However, the greatest threat by far is the possibility of a nuclear-armed Iran. Preventing that must be our first priority.

Senator Bill Nelson of Florida, who supports this deal, recently said there is "no other available option" \-- and I agree.

[**If you believe the Iran nuclear deal should go through and agree it is the best option available, please click here and show your support.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20c5/738133e4/3ac068b9/7f8982b3/4145148297/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e150902/")

America and Israel share an unbreakable bond. No matter where you fall in this debate, we are all working toward a safe Israel and a nuclear-free Iran. In support of these goals, I will support this deal.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20c5/738133e4/3ac068b9/7f8982ac/4145148297/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20c5/738133e4/3ac068b9/7f8982ad/4145148297/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved

name: Mike Cassesso, Van Hollen for Senate
subject: Do you have plans for Labor Day?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, Will you celebrate Labor Day with us? On Monday, September 7th, Team Van Hollen will be marching in the Kensington, Greenbelt and Gaithersburg Labor Day parades, and Chris wanted me to ask if you will walk with us. [**Click here to sign up for a parade!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f13/70cdc2ba/47a0cb40/3958d76/2076596578/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/join-team-van-hollen-on-labor-day") This is a great way to show your support for Chris and celebrate hard working Marylanders. Share this link, and bring your family and friends along. We hope to see you there! [**Click here for details and to sign up!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f13/70cdc2ba/47a0cb40/3958d76/2076596578/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/join-team-van-hollen-on-labor-day") Thanks, Mike Cassesso Field Director Van Hollen for Senate
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
